MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jonah D. King of SIMON GREENSTONE PANATIER BARTLETT, P.C. (V-562-590-3400), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Kevin and Diane Kavanaugh
Deborah L. Cote of McKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE (415-267-4138), appearing for defendant / opposing party Union Carbide Corporation
Anne C. Gritzer of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / opposing party TACO, Inc.
Jennifer M. Ways of PRINDLE, AMARO, GOETZ, HILLYARD, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP (415-788-8354), appearing for defendant / opposing party Trane US, Inc.
Lauren N. Peebles of BERRY & BERRY (510-250-0430), Designated Defense Counsel
(Refer to sign in sheet for other appearances.)

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE AND FOR AN ORDER THAT DEFENDANTS' DEPOSITION OF KEVIN KAVANAUGH BE LIMITED TO 14 HOURS
Prior to the hearing the Court disclosed that it owned less than $500 of the Pfizer Inc. stocks. No objection was made.
Hearing held. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion for preference is granted per C.C.P. 36(d). Trial is September 3, 2013 at 11:15am in Department 503. Last day for hearing summary motions is August 28, 2013. Pursuant to plaintiff's agreement Summary motions shall be heard on 28 days notice. The time to respond to written discovery is shortened to 20 days. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendant(s) no later than August 9, 2013. Responses to the demand are due no later than August 16, 2013. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on August 28, 2013. Fact discovery cut-off date is August 23, 2013. Expert discovery cut-off date is August 30, 2013. No later than May 28, 2013, plaintiff must provide a concise and detailed statement of facts stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiffs' claims. No later than May 28, 2013, defendants must provide a concise and detailed statement of facts stating the name and contact information of each lay person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements will be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown. No later than 2p.m. on May 10 plaintiffs must provide the uncertified Social Security records to Berry & Berry. The parties to meet and confer regarding any other scheduling or other issue which any of them want to have included in the preference order. Further case management conference on June 19, 2013 at 2:00pm. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on September 4, 2013 at 1:30pm in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by August 29, 2013 at 2:00pm. As to plaintiffs' motion for an order that defendants' deposition of Kevin Kavanaugh be limited to 14 hours is denied without prejudice. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
